t0_intro: This tool trains the Cardputer's native voice recognizer: it runs entirely offline, on the device, and learns your voice. The more you use it, the more accurate it gets — every recognized command fine-tunes its own model automatically.
t0_tip1: It's push-to-talk: hold FN (or G0) on the Cardputer, say the command, release.
t0_tip2: The device recognizes the word; ANIMA turns it into the action (open an app, tell the time…).
t0_tip3: No cloud, no key: the audio never leaves the device.
t1_intro: A few rules make a huge difference to accuracy:
t1_tip1: Quiet environment and a constant distance from the microphone (~20 cm).
t1_tip2: Press FN before speaking, release right after. One word/phrase per recording.
t1_tip3: Speak in a natural and steady way — just like you'll say it in real use.
t1_tip4: Pick distinct, multi-syllable commands. Avoid single syllables and words that sound nearly alike.
t2_intro: Let's start with a distinct, useful base set. Press Train, then hold FN and say the command shown.
t3_intro: Let's test what you've trained. Hold FN and say one of the commands: you'll see in real time what was recognized and how confidently. Notice how the radius tightens over time: that's the model learning you.
t4_intro: You've got the basics. From here you can:
t4_tip1: Add more commands from the Commands tab (up to 20).
t4_tip2: Create your own phrases from the Custom tab.
t4_tip3: Come back to Test whenever you like: every use improves recognition.
cmd_sub: Native commands ready to use. 🟢 = already trained with your voice. The device handles up to 20: pick your favorites.
test_sub: Hold FN on the Cardputer and say a trained command.
test_hint: Each recognition shows distance (lower = more similar), margin over the 2nd candidate, and the word's self-calibrating radius. Green = excellent, yellow = acceptable.
custom_sub: Record a phrase of your own that isn't in the curriculum. Keep it short and distinct.
rec_title: On the Cardputer: hold FN and speak
rec_too_short: ⚠️ Too short or silent — try again: hold FN and speak clearly.
rec_timeout: ⚠️ No response from the Cardputer. Make sure you're holding FN while you speak (recording happens on the device, not in the browser) and that the voice firmware is up to date.
alert_cap: You've reached the limit of {max} commands. Remove one first.
